title: Algorithm Backpack
subtitle: Compact pixel-art packs that link directly to each algorithm flowchart.

groups.name: Planning
groups.description: Search, sampling, and road-aligned trajectory generation for motion planning.

items.name: A*
items.detail: Heuristic graph search for shortest-path planning on discrete maps.

items.name: Hybrid A*
items.detail: Kinematically feasible search for car-like systems in continuous pose space.

items.name: RRT
items.detail: Sampling-based planning that grows a tree toward random states.

items.name: RRT*
items.detail: Sampling-based planning with rewiring for asymptotically better paths.

items.name: Frenet Frame
items.detail: Trajectory generation along a reference line using longitudinal and lateral coordinates.

items.name: APF (Voronoi)
items.detail: Potential-field planning improved with Voronoi-style clearance guidance.

items.name: DWA
items.detail: Local velocity-window planner with short-horizon rollout scoring.

groups.name: Control
groups.description: Feedback, optimal regulation, and receding-horizon control methods.

items.name: PID
items.detail: Classical proportional-integral-derivative feedback control for tracking and regulation.

items.name: LQR
items.detail: Quadratic optimal state-feedback control for linear systems.

items.name: MPC
items.detail: Constrained receding-horizon control solved repeatedly online.

items.name: iLQR
items.detail: Iterative optimal control for nonlinear systems using local linear-quadratic approximations.

groups.name: Optimization
groups.description: Optimization and smoothing tools for decision variables, trajectories, and geometric paths.

items.name: QP
items.detail: Quadratic programming for constrained convex optimization problems.

items.name: Spline
items.detail: Piecewise polynomial interpolation for smooth path and curve generation.

groups.name: Learning
groups.description: Reinforcement learning and generative modeling tools for sequential decision-making.

items.name: Q-learning
items.detail: Model-free reinforcement learning with Bellman action-value updates.

items.name: Diffusion
items.detail: Denoising-based generative modeling for trajectories, actions, or structured samples.
